note: The official Handbook publishes 79 units of Major Courses: all 17 Major Required Courses for 49 units and 30 units selected from the explicit 32-course Major Elective pool. Both 3-unit Honours Project courses are separately required for 6 units. FAGS3015 is retained at its published 1 unit, and FAGS3007 is marked as an internship because the official course description requires either an approved Internship or Practicum option. The Programme table misspells FAGS1005 as 'Diversity, Community an Performing Arts'; the individual official course page supplies the complete title used here. University Language, General Education and Free Electives are excluded. No Year or Term is assigned because the official requirement table does not publish course timing.
